problem: NotebookLM 'Strategic RAG Chunking' (cea806f1) synthesizes parent-child indexing, contextual retrieval framing, layout-aware splits, and metadata filtering. agent-rules had RAG Anatomy pipeline docs but no chunk_policy module, wiki heading ingest, or eval seed for hierarchical chunks.
solution: Sixth incorporation slice: RAG_CHUNKING_MAP, chunk_policy.py, wiki_chunk_ingest bridge, contextual framing on embed, cross-encoder rerank P1, books_rag reindex P1. Reject late chunking as rule-layer default.

user_stories.description: Operator has RAG_CHUNKING_MAP.md linking chunk strategies to ingest scripts.
chunk_policy.py produces parent-child chunks with required metadata fields.
Wiki ingest uses heading-based layout-aware splits.
Contextual framing prepends doc title and section path before embed text.
Eval seed rag-chunking.json with binary parent/metadata assertions.
Cross-encoder rerank hook integrated with fused_rag (P1).
books_rag reindex script supports parent-child metadata (P1).

technical_decisions.decision: Late chunking is out of scope until embedding stack supports it.
technical_decisions.rationale: NotebookLM + external verification; rule-layer cannot enforce.

technical_decisions.decision: Extend RAG Anatomy PRD corpus half; do not reopen Geometry or Harness PRDs.
MCP ask_question or assemble_rag_chunking_batch.py for grill; Playwright optional.
technical_decisions.rationale: MCP unstable on some notebooks; batch script reproducible.
